title: Advancement Plaques PR
description: This texture pack will replace the progress bar in the advancement plaques fashion with an interface like an the last reality.
body:
This resource pack replaces the standard appearance of the plates with improvements to the interface, as in an the last reality.

Note: This resource package requires Advancement Plaques to work.
![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6da0e408c6f022517f902408ee2ad3904bad3f3c.png)
